  pool: tank
 state: DEGRADED
config:

	NAME                         STATE     READ WRITE CKSUM
	tank                         DEGRADED     9    12    15
	  mirror-0                   DEGRADED     9    12    15
	    /dev/disk/by-id/disk-a   ONLINE       1     2     3
	    /dev/disk/by-id/disk-b   FAULTED      2     3     4
